title: Panel
description: Discriminated panel response — `type` selects the shape of `config`.

dataAsOf.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent pipeline run that wrote to this panel's bound DataType; null when unbound or never run.

$comment: Per-subtype config shapes live in $defs and are selected via the top-level oneOf below. dataSourceId is not a valid field — panels bind to DataTypes (config.dataTypeId), not DataSources directly.

label.description: Literal display label override — distinct from fieldMapping.label, which binds to a data column.

unit.description: Literal display unit override — distinct from fieldMapping.unit, which binds to a data column.

chartOptions.description: Per-chart-type display options keyed by chart type. Absent falls back to the pre-HEL-248 rendering. Options stored under a non-active type are ignored on render but preserved across type switches.

annotation.description: Optional static subtitle/footnote rendered beneath the chart title (HEL-318). Absent leaves it unchanged on PATCH; null/empty/whitespace clears it. Omitted from the response config when unset.

columnWidths.description: Per-column drag-resized pixel widths, keyed by column key. Absent or empty falls back to DataGrid's default/derived widths.

density.description: DataGrid row spacing. Absent falls back to normal.

columnOrder.description: Ordered list of visible data-column keys. Absent or empty shows all columns in natural order; when non-empty, exactly these keys render in this order (intersected with keys present in the data).

caption.description: Optional static caption rendered as a strip beneath the image (HEL-318). Absent leaves it unchanged on PATCH; null/empty/whitespace clears it. Omitted from the response config when unset.

CollectionConfig.description: Collection panel config (HEL-247). Binding reuses dataTypeId/fieldMapping; baseType/layout/itemOptions are the collection-specific concerns. Adding a future base type is a code-only change (widen the baseType enum + add an itemOptions key) — no schema-shape break.

fieldMapping.description: Shared field mapping applied to every rendered item.

baseType.description: Which base panel kind each item renders as. Ships with metric only; widening this enum is how a future base type is added.

layout.description: Item layout. Absent falls back to grid.

itemOptions.description: Shared literal item overrides, keyed per base type. Options under a non-active base type key are preserved across base-type switches.

CollectionItemOptions.description: Per-base-type shared item options for a collection panel.

CollectionMetricItemOptions.description: Literal label/unit overrides applied to every metric item (HEL-243 literal-wins semantics).

TimelineConfig.description: Timeline panel config (HEL-317). Binding reuses dataTypeId/fieldMapping with two slots (time, event); timelineOptions.sort is the timeline-specific concern.

fieldMapping.description: Binds the time (timestamp/order) and event (text) slots.

timelineOptions.description: Timeline-specific display options. Absent falls back to sort: asc.

sort.description: Chronological order. Absent falls back to asc.

ChartOptions.description: Per-chart-type display options (HEL-248). Each key is optional and independently shaped; every option maps to a real ECharts construct.

showPoints.description: series.showSymbol — render point markers on the line.

areaFill.description: series.areaStyle — fill the area beneath the line.

orientation.description: horizontal swaps the category/value axis roles.

stacking.description: stacked → series.stack; normalized → stacked plus a client-side per-category percent transform with a 0–100% value axis.

barGapPct.description: series.barCategoryGap — spacing between category groups, as a percentage.

donutHolePct.description: series.radius inner hole size, as a percentage (0 = full pie).

sizeField.description: Bound data-column key driving series.symbolSize (bubble sizing).

colorField.description: Bound data-column key that groups rows into one series (legend entry) per distinct value.
